_notes: Source: AU Core Patient (Australian realm). Target: US Core Patient (US realm). Both make identifier[min=1 MS], name[min=1 MS], gender[min=1 MS], address[MS], communication.language[MS] mandatory/MS. Key differences: AU Core has AU-specific root constraints, AU realm extensions (indigenousStatus, individualPronouns, AU-realm genderIdentity) and AU identifier slices (IHI/Medicare/DVA); US Core has US realm extensions (race, ethnicity, tribalAffiliation, birthsex, sex, US-realm genderIdentity) and requires identifier sub-elements (system/value min=1); US Core has telecom sub-element mandatory constraints; AU Core has name.text MS and birthDate mandatory while US Core does not; US Core adds address sub-element MS and communication.language extensible binding.

drifts.description: Source root constraints removed in target: AU Core defines au-core-pat-01(error), au-core-pat-02(error), and inv-pat-0 through inv-pat-5 constraints; US Core Patient has no equivalent root constraints (only us-core-6 on name sub-element).
Optional AU extension indigenousStatus[mustSupport=true] removed in target: US Core Patient has no indigenous status extension; it is AU-realm specific.
Extension birthPlace removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:birthPlace (optional, non-MS); US Core Patient has no birthPlace extension slice.
Extension veteranStatus removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:veteranStatus (optional, non-MS); US Core Patient has no veteranStatus extension slice.
Extension closingTheGapRegistration removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:closingTheGapRegistration (optional, non-MS); US Core Patient has no such extension slice.
Extension mothersMaidenName removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:mothersMaidenName (optional, non-MS); US Core Patient has no mothersMaidenName extension slice.
Extension interpreterRequired removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:interpreterRequired (optional, non-MS); US Core Patient has no interpreterRequired extension slice.
Extension dateOfArrival removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:dateOfArrival (optional, non-MS); US Core Patient has no dateOfArrival extension slice.
Extension recordedSexOrGender removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:recordedSexOrGender (optional, non-MS); US Core Patient has no AU recordedSexOrGender extension slice.

AU realm genderIdentity extension replaced by a different US realm extension: source has AU-realm genderIdentity[mustSupport=true]; target has US Core genderIdentity extension (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-genderIdentity) [optional]. Different realm-specific profile URLs.
Optional AU extension individualPronouns[mustSupport=true] removed in target: US Core Patient has no individualPronouns extension.
New optional US extension race[0..1] added in target (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-race); source AU Core has no race extension. New optional non-MS element added.

New optional US extension ethnicity[0..1] added in target (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-ethnicity); source AU Core has no ethnicity extension. New optional non-MS element added.
New optional US extension tribalAffiliation[0..*] added in target; source AU Core has no tribal affiliation extension. New optional non-MS element added.
New optional US extension birthsex[0..1] added in target; source AU Core has no birthsex extension. New optional non-MS element added.
New optional US extension sex[0..1] added in target; source AU Core has no sex extension. New optional non-MS element added.

identifier slicing removed in target: source AU Core defines pattern:type discriminator slicing on identifier with AU-specific slices (ihi, medicare, dva); US Core does not use slicing on identifier (replaces with mandatory sub-elements).

identifier type profile changed: source AU Core allows AU-specific identifier profiles (au-ihi, au-medicarecardnumber, au-dvanumber, au-healthcarecardnumber, au-pensionerconcessioncardnumber, au-cwlthseniorshealthcardnumber, au-medicalrecordnumber, au-insurancemembernumber) in addition to base Identifier; target US Core uses base Identifier only.
identifier:ihi AU slice [max=1, mustSupport=true, types=Identifier[au-ihi]] removed in target: US Core has no AU identifier slices.
identifier:medicare AU slice [max=1, mustSupport=true, types=Identifier[au-medicarecardnumber]] removed in target: US Core has no AU identifier slices.
identifier:dva AU slice [max=1, mustSupport=true, types=Identifier[au-dvanumber]] removed in target: US Core has no AU identifier slices.

identifier.system min cardinality strictly increased: target adds identifier.system[min=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core has no sub-element constraint on identifier.system (effective min=0). Min increased 0→1.

identifier.value min cardinality strictly increased: target adds identifier.value[min=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core has no sub-element constraint on identifier.value (effective min=0). Min increased 0→1.
Source constraint au-core-pat-03(error) on name removed in target; US Core adds its own name constraint us-core-6(error). Different error constraints on the same element across realms.
New error constraint us-core-6(error) added in target on name: US Core requires name to contain family or given or text when present; this is a new error constraint added in target.

name.use MustSupport removed on optional element: source AU Core marks name.use[mustSupport=true]; US Core lists name.use in differential but does not mark it as mustSupport. MS removed on optional element.
name.text MustSupport removed on optional element: source AU Core marks name.text[mustSupport=true]; US Core does not constrain name.text in its differential. MS removed on optional element.

telecom MustSupport removed on optional element: source AU Core marks telecom[mustSupport=true]; US Core does not mark telecom itself as mustSupport (only constrains sub-elements). MS removed on optional element.

telecom.system min cardinality strictly increased: target adds telecom.system[min=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core has no sub-element constraint on telecom.system (effective min=0). Min increased 0→1.

telecom.system new required binding added in target: US Core adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/contact-point-system); source AU Core has no binding on telecom.system. New mandatory binding in target.

telecom.value min cardinality strictly increased: target adds telecom.value[min=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core has no sub-element constraint on telecom.value (effective min=0). Min increased 0→1.
telecom.use MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds telecom.use[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core has no constraint on telecom.use. MS added on optional element.
telecom.use new required binding added in target: US Core adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/contact-point-use); source AU Core has no binding on telecom.use. New required binding in target.

gender required binding explicitly re-declared in target: US Core adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/administrative-gender) in its differential; source AU Core does not declare a binding on gender (inherits R4 required binding). Binding explicitly strengthened/re-declared in target.

address type profile changed: source AU Core uses au-address profile (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/StructureDefinition/au-address) on address; target US Core uses the base Address type. AU-specific address profile removed.
birthDate cardinality relaxed: source [min=1, mustSupport=true] → target [no min, mustSupport=true]. Min decreased from 1 to 0. MustSupport preserved.

address.line MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds address.line[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core marks address as MS but does not constrain sub-elements. MS added on optional element.
address.city MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds address.city[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain address.city. MS added on optional element.
address.state MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds address.state[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain address.state. MS added on optional element.

address.state new binding added in target: US Core adds extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-usps-state) [US postal state codes]; source AU Core has no binding on address.state. New US realm-specific binding applied.

address.postalCode MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds address.postalCode[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain address.postalCode. MS added on optional element.

communication.language binding changed: source AU Core has extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/common-languages-australia-2) [AU common languages VS]; target US Core adds extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/simple-language). Same binding strength, AU-specific VS replaced by US Core VS.

communication MustSupport removed on optional element: source AU Core marks communication[mustSupport=true]; US Core does not mark communication itself as mustSupport (only sub-elements language and preferred are constrained). MS removed on optional element.

communication.preferred MustSupport removed on optional element: source AU Core marks communication.preferred[mustSupport=true]; US Core does not constrain communication.preferred in its differential. MS removed on optional element.

contact.relationship binding changed: source extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/contact-relationship-type-3) [AU contact relationship type VS] → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/patient-contactrelationship) [R4 base VS]. Same binding strength, AU-specific VS replaced by R4 base VS.
contact.address type profile changed: source AU Core uses au-address profile (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/StructureDefinition/au-address) on contact.address; target US Core uses the base Address type.

birthDate sub-extension accuracyIndicator removed in target: source AU Core defines Patient.birthDate.extension:accuracyIndicator (au-date-accuracy-indicator profile, optional, non-MS); US Core Patient has no such sub-extension.

birthDate sub-extension birthTime removed in target: source AU Core defines Patient.birthDate.extension:birthTime (patient-birthTime profile, optional, non-MS); US Core Patient has no birthTime sub-extension.

deceased sub-extension accuracyIndicator removed in target: source AU Core defines Patient.deceased[x]:deceasedDateTime.extension:accuracyIndicator (au-date-accuracy-indicator profile, optional, non-MS); US Core Patient has no such sub-extension.
